---
title: "Schemas"
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Schemas}
  %\VignetteEngine{quarto::html}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
knitr:
  opts_chunk:
    collapse: true
    comment: '#>'
    echo: false
---

```{r}
#| label: setup
#| message: false
use("nemo", "nemo_schema_reactable")
```

```{r}
#| label: reactable
nemo_schema_reactable("tool1", pkg = "nemo")
```
